name: Dispersed Text
title: Dispersed Text
description: Type that assembles from a cloud of particles streaming in from the left, then melts into a flowing, cursor-swirled field on hover and reforms when the cursor leaves. Renders to a transparent canvas so it reads on any surface — set the particle color to match. Wraps onto multiple lines, samples your own font, and falls back to a calm static word under reduced motion.
